perks.summary: deploy + operate the RTVI-CV 2D detection/tracking microservice: resolve defaults, fetch NGC assets, configure + launch the perception container, add streams
deterministically enumerate local video streams: scan $RESOURCES for any directory holding .mp4/.mkv, list them in stable sorted order, and cycle them into exactly STREAM_COUNT unique (id, url) pairs
render a perfectly-aligned fixed-width light-box step receipt (┌──title──┐ / │ row │ / └──┘) from body rows, the per-step output primitive of the deploy flow
sample the running RTVI-CV /api/v1/metrics endpoint N times (plus nvidia-smi temp/power) and print averaged GPU/CPU/RAM + a per-stream FPS table; degrades to n/a + exit 0 when offline
reconstruct the full multi-line `docker run …` command for an existing container from docker inspect (mounts, --gpus, --network, user-supplied -e env), with secrets redacted
verify CUDA / NVML access inside a running container via `nvidia-smi -L` over docker exec, detecting the silent stale-GPU-handle state before config-apply / app-launch
tidy the TRT engine cache directory: relocate any non-(*.engine|*.plan) file into <cache>/.quarantine/ so stray build artefacts stop polluting the cache; idempotent, never deletes
